title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 487.110 - Uniform child custody jurisdiction act, application
text:
487.110.  Uniform child custody jurisdiction act, application. — The uniform child custody jurisdiction act, as enacted in sections 452.440 to 452.550*, shall apply to all custody proceedings in the family court.
(L. 1993 H.B. 346 § 7) 
*Sections 452.440 to 452.550 were repealed by H.B. 481, 2009.  Sections 452.700 to 452.930, the Uniform Child Custody Jurisdiction and Enforcement Act (UCCJEA), were enacted by H.B. 481, 2009.
